pr.title: Record: L-BFGS Causal SLOT — val_bpb 1.0046 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Eval-time L-BFGS optimizes causal logit-space SLOT deltas (focal loss, warm-start) with pre-quant AdamW TTT and coprime-shard tweaks for compliant sliding eval.
techniques: Causal logit-space SLOT optimized by L-BFGS using focal loss on already-scored context positions
Pre-quant AdamW TTT on FP EMA weights before GPTQ quantization
Coprime-stride multi-shard loader plus tuned config (QK_GAIN=5.0, WARMDOWN=4000, damp=0.005)
